name: Pablo Altimiras
background: Mr. Altimiras joined the Company in 2007. He has served as our Executive Vice President of Nitrates and Potassium since 2018. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.
